_comment: The rules the deterministic kernel enforces BEFORE any signing. Hashed + committed on-chain (ERC-8004) before the trading week. Thresholds are provisional until the organizers answer the drawdown/cost/capital questions (see ../HACKATHON_RESEARCH.md §open questions).

risk._comment_dd: Kill-switch trips at 20% — a 10-pt buffer below the ~30% DQ line. Confirm exact DQ definition with organizers.

allocation._comment_alloc: Barbell. Core bounds drawdown + carries the daily qualifier; sleeve takes regime-gated momentum shots. Re-tune once capital-normalization is confirmed.

trading._comment_spot: TWAK has no perps; spot-only is forced (and it's the #1 DQ-risk reduction).

allowlist._comment: The 149 eligible BEP-20 tokens (CMC-listed). PLACEHOLDER subset — paste the full list from ../HACKATHON_RESEARCH.md before the trading week. Trades outside this list do not count.
